statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Repo system research notes for kernel registry values
links.summary: The repo documents DpcQueueDepth = 4 as personal research and ties it to KiMaximumDpcQueueDepth.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes DpcQueueDepth = 4 for the current tweak.

links.title: Decompiled DPC queue-depth system-information handler
links.summary: The decompiled system-information setter populates KiMaximumDpcQueueDepth from the caller buffer, and the query path exports KiMaximumDpcQueueDepth back out, proving the kernel queue depth is consumed and reported by system code.
